resources.string: World-famous palace and park ensemble with fountains on the shore of the Gulf of Finland.
The city\'s oldest garden with a collection of marble sculptures and an exquisite fence.
A huge park on Krestovsky Island, home to the Divo-Ostrov amusement park.
A cozy landscape park, former family residence of the Russian emperors.
The country\'s main museum with a vast collection of world art.
The world\'s largest collection of Russian fine art.
Cabinet of curiosities founded by Peter the Great — Russia\'s first museum.
The largest Orthodox church in St. Petersburg and a museum with a stunning colonnade.
The legendary spot for traditional donuts with powdered sugar and barrel coffee.
An exquisite cafe in the House of Books with the best view of the Kazan Cathedral.
A popular Russian cuisine chain: pancakes, porridges, and traditional drinks.
The city\'s oldest confectionery, famous for its cakes and pastries.
A guide to the most interesting places in Saint Petersburg.
